title: Channels Divine Blessings
summary: A devout follower of a divine being, you channel some of your deity’s power to achieve wonders.
tiers: Tier 3: Divine Radiance or Fire Bloom
Tier 6: Divine Symbol or Summon Demon
gm_intrusions: A demon investigates divine magic use. A rival cult has issues with the character’s teachings.
text: A devout follower of a divine being, you channel some of your deity’s power to achieve wonders.
details: A devout follower of a divine being, you channel some of your deity’s power to achieve wonders.
